name: My Esports Genius Brother
original_name: 电竞天才的沦陷倒计时
overview: Esports player Jiang Yi Feng, who lacks taste, touch, and color vision, clashes with idol Lu Lin online—until meeting him awakens new sensations.

trailers.title: My Esports Genius Brother | Official Trailer | A Chinese BL mini series with extra sweetener!
